title: AMP remember response
description: Response payload returned by the remember operation.

id.description: Server-assigned identifier for the stored (or staged) memory.

stored_at.description: Unix epoch ms when the memory was stored (or staged for approval).

stores.description: Names of backend stores that accepted the write.

pending_approval.description: True if the memory is staged but not yet committed because governance review is required.

approval_url.description: URL to the governance UI for reviewing this memory; null when no approval is pending.
